requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substance Restriction — No Horizontal RoHS in Egypt vs CN GB/T 26572
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——埃及无横向 RoHS vs 中国 GB/T 26572
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——埃及無橫向 RoHS vs 中國 GB/T 26572

summary.en: As of 2026, Egypt does not operate a horizontal RoHS-style hazardous-substance restriction for electrical and electronic equipment equivalent to EU RoHS (2011/65/EU) or China RoHS (GB/T 26572). There is no general Egyptian regulation that caps lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, or phthalates in homogeneous materials of EEE as a market-entry condition. Substance-related safety is instead addressed only indirectly — through the EOS product-safety standards (which incorporate IEC requirements on materials such as insulation, flammability, and toxic-by-use limits within the safety scope) and through general consumer-protection and chemical-handling law. There is therefore no Egyptian RoHS declaration of conformity to provide. This must be re-verified against current EOS/Egyptian government sources, as substance regulation can change.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，埃及没有针对电气电子设备、相当于欧盟 RoHS（2011/65/EU）或中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572）的横向有害物质限制制度。没有任何一般性的埃及法规将 EEE 均质材料中的铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 或邻苯二甲酸酯设为市场准入条件的上限。与物质相关的安全仅通过间接方式处理——通过 EOS 产品安全标准（在安全范围内纳入 IEC 对绝缘、阻燃及使用中毒性限值等材料的要求）以及一般消费者保护和化学品管理法。因此不存在须提供的埃及 RoHS 符合性声明。鉴于物质监管可能变化，此点须对照现行 EOS/埃及政府来源重新核实。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，埃及沒有針對電氣電子設備、相當於歐盟 RoHS（2011/65/EU）或中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572）的橫向有害物質限制制度。沒有任何一般性的埃及法規將 EEE 均質材料中的鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 或鄰苯二甲酸酯設為市場准入條件的上限。與物質相關的安全僅通過間接方式處理——通過 EOS 產品安全標準（在安全範圍內納入 IEC 對絕緣、阻燃及使用中毒性限值等材料的要求）以及一般消費者保護和化學品管理法。因此不存在須提供的埃及 RoHS 符合性聲明。鑒於物質監管可能變化，此點須對照現行 EOS/埃及政府來源重新核實。

standards_or_laws: Egypt — no horizontal RoHS-equivalent hazardous-substance restriction for EEE as of 2026 (substance control addressed indirectly via EOS product-safety standards)
EOS product-safety standards (adopting IEC 60598 / 62560) — material requirements within the safety scope (insulation, flammability) rather than a substance-restriction regime

summary.en: China operates China RoHS via GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE), covering the 6 original RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS, plus SJ/T 11364-2014 which requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange = contains above threshold / green = below threshold) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS is a disclosure-and-restriction regime applicable to the domestic market.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求）实行中国 RoHS，涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同；另有 SJ/T 11364-2014 要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色=含量超过限值/绿色=低于限值）。中国 RoHS 是适用于国内市场的披露与限制制度。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求）實行中國 RoHS，涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同；另有 SJ/T 11364-2014 要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色=含量超過限值/綠色=低於限值）。中國 RoHS 是適用於國內市場的披露與限制制度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (China, 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in EEE (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Here the direction of the gap is reversed compared with most rows: China imposes a substance-restriction/disclosure regime (GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364) that Egypt does not require. There is no Egyptian RoHS declaration to prepare and no Egyptian hazardous-substance label obligation as a market-entry condition as of 2026. A CN-compliant product therefore already exceeds Egypt's (absent) horizontal substance requirement. However, exporters should not treat this as a permanent exemption: (1) substance limits can still apply indirectly through EOS product-safety standards (e.g. material flammability, insulation, and any toxicity provisions within IEC 60598/62560); (2) end customers, distributors, or large buyers may contractually require RoHS/REACH compliance even where Egyptian law does not; (3) substance regulation in Egypt may change. Verify the current position against official EOS/Egyptian government sources before relying on the absence of a requirement.
gap.zh: 此处差距方向与多数行相反：中国施加了埃及不要求的物质限制/披露制度（GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364）。截至 2026 年，不存在须准备的埃及 RoHS 声明，也无作为市场准入条件的埃及有害物质标签义务。因此符合中国标准的产品已超出埃及（缺位的）横向物质要求。但出口商不应将此视为永久豁免：（1）物质限值仍可能通过 EOS 产品安全标准间接适用（如 IEC 60598/62560 内的材料阻燃、绝缘及任何毒性条款）；（2）终端客户、经销商或大买家即使埃及法律未要求，也可能在合同上要求 RoHS/REACH 合规；（3）埃及的物质监管可能变化。在依赖此要求缺位前，请对照现行 EOS/埃及政府官方来源核实当前情况。
gap.zht: 此處差距方向與多數行相反：中國施加了埃及不要求的物質限制/披露制度（GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364）。截至 2026 年，不存在須準備的埃及 RoHS 聲明，也無作為市場准入條件的埃及有害物質標籤義務。因此符合中國標準的產品已超出埃及（缺位的）橫向物質要求。但出口商不應將此視為永久豁免：（1）物質限值仍可能通過 EOS 產品安全標準間接適用（如 IEC 60598/62560 內的材料阻燃、絕緣及任何毒性條款）；（2）終端客戶、經銷商或大買家即使埃及法律未要求，也可能在合同上要求 RoHS/REACH 合規；（3）埃及的物質監管可能變化。在依賴此要求缺位前，請對照現行 EOS/埃及政府官方來源核實當前情況。

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory (no horizontal RoHS) — no Egyptian RoHS-equivalent substance restriction or disclosure label required for EEE market entry as of 2026; substance issues addressed only indirectly via product-safety standards
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS GB/T 26572 (6 substances) + SJ/T 11364 disclosure label required for EEE sold in China

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt has no horizontal RoHS-equivalent substance-restriction or disclosure regime for EEE as of 2026, so there is no Egyptian RoHS declaration to prepare — a CN-compliant product (GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364) already exceeds Egypt's absent requirement. Do not treat this as permanent: substance issues can apply indirectly via EOS product-safety standards, buyers may contractually require RoHS/REACH, and Egyptian rules may change. Verify against official EOS/government sources.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，埃及对 EEE 没有横向 RoHS 等效的物质限制或披露制度，因此不存在须准备的埃及 RoHS 声明——符合中国标准的产品（GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364）已超出埃及缺位的要求。请勿视为永久：物质问题可能通过 EOS 产品安全标准间接适用，买家可能在合同上要求 RoHS/REACH，且埃及规则可能变化。请对照 EOS/政府官方来源核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，埃及對 EEE 沒有橫向 RoHS 等效的物質限制或披露制度，因此不存在須準備的埃及 RoHS 聲明——符合中國標準的產品（GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364）已超出埃及缺位的要求。請勿視為永久：物質問題可能通過 EOS 產品安全標準間接適用，買家可能在合同上要求 RoHS/REACH，且埃及規則可能變化。請對照 EOS/政府官方來源核實。

requirement_topic.en: Mercury and Restricted Materials via Product-Safety Standards (no RoHS) vs CN RoHS Substances
requirement_topic.zh: 通过产品安全标准管理的汞及限制材料（无 RoHS）vs 中国 RoHS 物质
requirement_topic.zht: 通過產品安全標準管理的汞及限制材料（無 RoHS）vs 中國 RoHS 物質

summary.en: Because Egypt lacks a horizontal RoHS, the closest substance-related controls for LED luminaires come from within the EOS product-safety standards adopting IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 — for example requirements on insulation materials, flammability of housings and components, creepage/clearance materials, and the general safe construction of the product. LED light sources do not contain mercury (unlike fluorescent lamps), so the historic mercury concern is largely moot for LED; nonetheless, any mercury-containing legacy or hybrid product would be assessed under the relevant safety/material requirements rather than a dedicated substance cap. There is no separate Egyptian heavy-metal or flame-retardant substance limit acting as an independent market-entry gate as of 2026. Confirm the current ES safety standard editions in force.
summary.zh: 由于埃及缺乏横向 RoHS，LED 灯具最接近的物质相关管控来自采纳 IEC 60598/IEC 62560 的 EOS 产品安全标准——例如对绝缘材料、外壳及组件阻燃性、爬电距离/电气间隙材料及产品总体安全结构的要求。LED 光源不含汞（与荧光灯不同），故历史性的汞关切对 LED 大体不再适用；尽管如此，任何含汞的遗留或混合产品将依据相关安全/材料要求评估，而非专门的物质上限。截至 2026 年，不存在作为独立市场准入门槛的单独埃及重金属或阻燃剂物质限值。请确认现行有效的 ES 安全标准版本。
summary.zht: 由於埃及缺乏橫向 RoHS，LED 燈具最接近的物質相關管控來自採納 IEC 60598/IEC 62560 的 EOS 產品安全標準——例如對絕緣材料、外殼及組件阻燃性、爬電距離/電氣間隙材料及產品總體安全結構的要求。LED 光源不含汞（與熒光燈不同），故歷史性的汞關切對 LED 大體不再適用；盡管如此，任何含汞的遺留或混合產品將依據相關安全/材料要求評估，而非專門的物質上限。截至 2026 年，不存在作為獨立市場准入門檻的單獨埃及重金屬或阻燃劑物質限值。請確認現行有效的 ES 安全標準版本。

standards_or_laws: EOS product-safety standards adopting IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 — material, insulation, and flammability requirements within the safety scope
Egypt — no dedicated heavy-metal or flame-retardant substance cap as an independent market-entry condition (as of 2026)

summary.en: China's GB/T 26572 caps the 6 RoHS substances (including mercury Hg ≤0.1% and lead Pb ≤0.1%) in homogeneous materials of EEE, and SJ/T 11364 requires the corresponding disclosure label. In parallel, Chinese product-safety standards GB 7000.1 (luminaire safety) and GB 24906 / related GB standards (self-ballasted LED lamp safety) address insulation and flammability within the safety scope — so in China both a substance-restriction regime and the safety-material requirements apply together.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 26572 对 EEE 均质材料中的 6 项 RoHS 物质（含汞 Hg ≤0.1%、铅 Pb ≤0.1%）设上限，SJ/T 11364 要求相应披露标识。与此并行，中国产品安全标准 GB 7000.1（灯具安全）及 GB 24906/相关 GB 标准（自镇流 LED 灯安全）在安全范围内处理绝缘和阻燃——因此在中国，物质限制制度与安全材料要求并行适用。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 26572 對 EEE 均質材料中的 6 項 RoHS 物質（含汞 Hg ≤0.1%、鉛 Pb ≤0.1%）設上限，SJ/T 11364 要求相應披露標識。與此並行，中國產品安全標準 GB 7000.1（燈具安全）及 GB 24906/相關 GB 標準（自鎮流 LED 燈安全）在安全範圍內處理絕緣和阻燃——因此在中國，物質限制制度與安全材料要求並行適用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — RoHS substance concentration limits incl. mercury and lead (China)
GB 7000.1 / GB 24906 — luminaire and self-ballasted LED lamp safety, insulation and flammability material requirements (China)

gap.en: In China a CN product carries both the GB/T 26572 substance restriction and the GB 7000.1/GB 24906 safety-material requirements. For Egypt, only the safety-material side has an equivalent (via the ES standards adopting IEC 60598/62560); the dedicated substance cap has no Egyptian counterpart. The practical effect is that meeting Egypt's requirement is less demanding on the substance dimension — but exporters should keep their existing CN RoHS test data, because: (1) it is already done and supports buyer/contractual RoHS requests; (2) it demonstrates material compliance that overlaps with the IEC safety-standard material expectations; and (3) it future-proofs against any introduction of substance rules in Egypt. The actionable gap is therefore minimal for substances, but the safety-material requirements (flammability, insulation) under the ES/IEC safety standard must still be met and evidenced — see the ledeg-safety rows.
gap.zh: 在中国，产品同时承载 GB/T 26572 物质限制与 GB 7000.1/GB 24906 安全材料要求。对于埃及，只有安全材料一侧有对应（通过采纳 IEC 60598/62560 的 ES 标准）；专门的物质上限没有埃及对应。实际效果是埃及在物质维度的要求较低——但出口商应保留其现有的中国 RoHS 检测数据，因为：（1）已经完成且支持买家/合同的 RoHS 请求；（2）展示与 IEC 安全标准材料预期重叠的材料合规；（3）为埃及未来可能引入物质规则做好准备。因此在物质方面可执行的差距很小，但 ES/IEC 安全标准下的安全材料要求（阻燃、绝缘）仍须满足并提供证据——见 ledeg-safety 各行。
gap.zht: 在中國，產品同時承載 GB/T 26572 物質限制與 GB 7000.1/GB 24906 安全材料要求。對於埃及，只有安全材料一側有對應（通過採納 IEC 60598/62560 的 ES 標準）；專門的物質上限沒有埃及對應。實際效果是埃及在物質維度的要求較低——但出口商應保留其現有的中國 RoHS 檢測數據，因為：（1）已經完成且支持買家/合同的 RoHS 請求；（2）展示與 IEC 安全標準材料預期重疊的材料合規；（3）為埃及未來可能引入物質規則做好準備。因此在物質方面可執行的差距很小，但 ES/IEC 安全標準下的安全材料要求（阻燃、絕緣）仍須滿足並提供證據——見 ledeg-safety 各行。

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory (no substance cap) — no dedicated Egyptian heavy-metal/flame-retardant substance limit; material safety addressed only within ES/IEC product-safety standards
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 26572 substance limits (incl. Hg, Pb) plus GB 7000.1/GB 24906 safety-material requirements apply together in China

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt has no dedicated heavy-metal/flame-retardant substance cap; only the material-safety side (via ES standards adopting IEC 60598/62560) has an Egyptian counterpart, and LED sources are mercury-free. A CN product already over-satisfies the substance dimension — retain CN RoHS data for buyer requests and future-proofing, but focus the actual work on meeting the ES/IEC safety-material requirements (flammability, insulation) evidenced in the safety rows.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及没有专门的重金属/阻燃剂物质上限；只有材料安全一侧（通过采纳 IEC 60598/62560 的 ES 标准）有埃及对应，且 LED 光源不含汞。中国产品在物质维度已过度满足——请保留中国 RoHS 数据以应对买家请求及未来准备，但将实际工作聚焦于满足安全行所证明的 ES/IEC 安全材料要求（阻燃、绝缘）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及沒有專門的重金屬/阻燃劑物質上限；只有材料安全一側（通過採納 IEC 60598/62560 的 ES 標準）有埃及對應，且 LED 光源不含汞。中國產品在物質維度已過度滿足——請保留中國 RoHS 數據以應對買家請求及未來準備，但將實際工作聚焦於滿足安全行所證明的 ES/IEC 安全材料要求（阻燃、絕緣）。

requirement_topic.en: GOEIC Importer/Factory Registration (Decree 43/2016) and Customs Substance Documentation vs CN CCC
requirement_topic.zh: GOEIC 进口商/工厂注册（第 43/2016 号法令）及海关物质文件 vs 中国 CCC
requirement_topic.zht: GOEIC 進口商/工廠注冊（第 43/2016 號法令）及海關物質文件 vs 中國 CCC

summary.en: Although Egypt has no RoHS, market entry is gated administratively by GOEIC (General Organization for Export and Import Control). Under Decree 43/2016, foreign factories producing certain consumer products (including lighting/electrical appliances) must be registered in the GOEIC importer/factory registry before their products may be imported; the registration requires factory documentation, quality-system evidence (e.g. ISO 9001), trademark proof, and product details. Imports also undergo GOEIC inspection at the port, where conformity to EOS standards and the declared product specification is checked. There is no substance-restriction certificate to file, but the registration and import-inspection documentation effectively control market access. Ports of entry include Alexandria, Port Said, and Damietta. Verify the current GOEIC registration scope and document checklist.
summary.zh: 尽管埃及没有 RoHS，市场准入在行政上由 GOEIC（出口与进口管制总局）把关。根据第 43/2016 号法令，生产某些消费品（含照明/电器）的外国工厂须在 GOEIC 进口商/工厂注册系统注册，其产品方可进口；注册须提供工厂文件、质量体系证据（如 ISO 9001）、商标证明及产品详情。进口在港口还须经 GOEIC 检验，核查对 EOS 标准及声明产品规格的符合性。无须提交物质限制证书，但注册及进口检验文件实质上控制市场准入。入境口岸包括亚历山大、塞得港和杜姆亚特。请核实现行 GOEIC 注册范围及文件清单。
summary.zht: 盡管埃及沒有 RoHS，市場准入在行政上由 GOEIC（出口與進口管制總局）把關。根據第 43/2016 號法令，生產某些消費品（含照明/電器）的外國工廠須在 GOEIC 進口商/工廠注冊系統注冊，其產品方可進口；注冊須提供工廠文件、質量體系證據（如 ISO 9001）、商標證明及產品詳情。進口在港口還須經 GOEIC 檢驗，核查對 EOS 標準及聲明產品規格的符合性。無須提交物質限制證書，但注冊及進口檢驗文件實質上控制市場准入。入境口岸包括亞歷山大、塞得港和杜姆亞特。請核實現行 GOEIC 注冊範圍及文件清單。

standards_or_laws: Egyptian Decree 43/2016 — GOEIC registry of foreign factories/companies whose products may be imported into Egypt (registration prerequisite for covered products incl. lighting/electrical)
GOEIC (General Organization for Export and Import Control) — import inspection and conformity check against EOS standards at port

summary.en: China's analogous market-access gate is CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA, with mandatory third-party certification by bodies such as CQC for luminaires sold in the residential market. CCC verifies product conformity (safety/EMC) rather than registering the importer/factory; importer-side controls in China are handled through separate customs and AQSIQ/SAMR inspection mechanisms. CCC is a product certification, whereas GOEIC Decree 43/2016 is fundamentally a factory/importer registration plus port inspection regime — different in legal mechanism.
summary.zh: 中国类似的市场准入门槛是由 CNCA 管理的中国强制性产品认证（CCC），居民市场销售灯具须由 CQC 等机构进行强制性第三方认证。CCC 核查产品符合性（安全/EMC），而非注册进口商/工厂；中国进口商侧的管控通过单独的海关及 AQSIQ/市场监管总局检验机制处理。CCC 是产品认证，而 GOEIC 第 43/2016 号法令本质上是工厂/进口商注册加港口检验制度——法律机制不同。
summary.zht: 中國類似的市場准入門檻是由 CNCA 管理的中國強制性產品認證（CCC），居民市場銷售燈具須由 CQC 等機構進行強制性第三方認證。CCC 核查產品符合性（安全/EMC），而非注冊進口商/工廠；中國進口商側的管控通過單獨的海關及 AQSIQ/市場監管總局檢驗機制處理。CCC 是產品認證，而 GOEIC 第 43/2016 號法令本質上是工廠/進口商注冊加港口檢驗制度——法律機制不同。

standards_or_laws: CNCA CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory product certification for residential luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
China customs and SAMR import inspection mechanisms (importer-side controls, distinct from product certification)

gap.en: The legal mechanism differs fundamentally and a CCC certificate does not satisfy the GOEIC route. For Egypt the exporter must, before shipment: (1) ensure the foreign factory is registered in the GOEIC registry under Decree 43/2016 (requires ISO 9001 or equivalent quality-system evidence, trademark/ownership proof, factory and product documentation — this can take time and must be in place before the first import); (2) ensure the Egyptian importer is properly registered with GOEIC; (3) prepare the product technical/test documentation (EOS conformity to the adopted IEC safety/EMC/energy standards) for port inspection; (4) plan for GOEIC inspection at the port of entry (Alexandria / Port Said / Damietta). Because there is no RoHS certificate to file, the documentary burden is concentrated on the registration and conformity-to-ES side rather than substance testing. Verify the current GOEIC registration checklist and whether the specific HS code/product falls in the Decree 43/2016 registration scope.
gap.zh: 法律机制根本不同，CCC 证书不能满足 GOEIC 路径。对于埃及，出口商在出货前须：（1）确保外国工厂依据第 43/2016 号法令在 GOEIC 注册系统注册（须 ISO 9001 或等效质量体系证据、商标/所有权证明、工厂及产品文件——此过程可能耗时且须在首次进口前完成）；（2）确保埃及进口商已在 GOEIC 妥善注册；（3）为港口检验准备产品技术/检测文件（对所采纳 IEC 安全/EMC/能效标准的 EOS 符合性）；（4）为入境口岸（亚历山大/塞得港/杜姆亚特）的 GOEIC 检验做好计划。由于无须提交 RoHS 证书，文件负担集中于注册及对 ES 符合性一侧，而非物质检测。请核实现行 GOEIC 注册清单，以及具体 HS 编码/产品是否落入第 43/2016 号法令注册范围。
gap.zht: 法律機制根本不同，CCC 證書不能滿足 GOEIC 路徑。對於埃及，出口商在出貨前須：（1）確保外國工廠依據第 43/2016 號法令在 GOEIC 注冊系統注冊（須 ISO 9001 或等效質量體系證據、商標/所有權證明、工廠及產品文件——此過程可能耗時且須在首次進口前完成）；（2）確保埃及進口商已在 GOEIC 妥善注冊；（3）為港口檢驗準備產品技術/檢測文件（對所採納 IEC 安全/EMC/能效標準的 EOS 符合性）；（4）為入境口岸（亞歷山大/塞得港/杜姆亞特）的 GOEIC 檢驗做好計劃。由於無須提交 RoHS 證書，文件負擔集中於注冊及對 ES 符合性一側，而非物質檢測。請核實現行 GOEIC 注冊清單，以及具體 HS 編碼/產品是否落入第 43/2016 號法令注冊範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GOEIC importer registration plus foreign-factory registration under Decree 43/2016 required before import of covered products; port inspection against EOS standards
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC product certification required for residential luminaires; importer controls via separate customs/SAMR mechanisms (different legal mechanism)

source.publisher: General Organization for Export and Import Control (GOEIC), Egypt

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Even without a RoHS regime, Egypt gates market entry through GOEIC: foreign-factory registration under Decree 43/2016 (ISO 9001, trademark, factory/product docs) plus importer registration and port inspection against EOS standards. A CCC certificate does not satisfy this. Start the GOEIC factory registration early — it must be in place before the first import — and prepare EOS-conformity documentation for inspection at Alexandria / Port Said / Damietta. Verify the current registration checklist and HS-code scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使没有 RoHS 制度，埃及通过 GOEIC 把关市场准入：依据第 43/2016 号法令的外国工厂注册（ISO 9001、商标、工厂/产品文件）加进口商注册及对 EOS 标准的港口检验。CCC 证书不能满足此要求。请尽早启动 GOEIC 工厂注册——须在首次进口前完成——并为亚历山大/塞得港/杜姆亚特的检验准备 EOS 符合性文件。请核实现行注册清单及 HS 编码范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使沒有 RoHS 制度，埃及通過 GOEIC 把關市場准入：依據第 43/2016 號法令的外國工廠注冊（ISO 9001、商標、工廠/產品文件）加進口商注冊及對 EOS 標準的港口檢驗。CCC 證書不能滿足此要求。請盡早啟動 GOEIC 工廠注冊——須在首次進口前完成——並為亞歷山大/塞得港/杜姆亞特的檢驗準備 EOS 符合性文件。請核實現行注冊清單及 HS 編碼範圍。
